positive: Minimalist depiction of a crescent moon nestled within a stylized cluster of geometric flora and celestial elements. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, featuring clean, thick outlines (line art style) and solid areas of negative space. Use a deep indigo blue, cosmic purple, and muted gold color palette. The design should evoke a sense of peaceful wonder, suitable for repeating apparel prints. Highly crisp, graphic vector style, perfect for silkscreen printing, clean silhouette, high contrast, intricate but readable details, centralized motif.
negative: blurry, noise, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, messy, faded, low detail, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realistic photo, photorealism
